home.subtitle: Gereranya buri gice cyubuzima bwawe - menya amanota yawe

dashboard.title: Kugaragaza Algorithm Gukurikirana Amateka
dashboard.subtitle: Kurikirana iterambere ryawe mugihe
dashboard.tryWiderRange: Gerageza intera nini cyangwa uhitemo ikindi gihe.
dashboard.completeFirst: Uzuza isuzuma rya mbere kugirango urebe iterambere ryawe n'ibigenda hano.

focusAreas.title: Ibice byibanze
focusAreas.subtitle: Ibyiciro byawe 3 byamanota make - kunoza ibi bitera inyungu nyinshi.
focusAreas.empty: Uzuza amasomo menshi kugirango ubone ibyifuzo byibanze byibanze.

settings.title: Igenamiterere rya porogaramu
settings.saveLastSessionDesc: Banza wuzuze ibisubizo uhereye kumasomo yawe aheruka.
settings.resetProgressDesc: Siba ibisubizo byose wabitswe hanyuma utangire bishya.
settings.targetScoreDesc: Shiraho amanota yintego (1.000-10,000) kugirango ukurikirane iterambere ryawe kurubaho.
settings.clearConfirmMessage: Ibi bizasiba burundu ibisubizo byawe byose byubu kandi ntibishobora gusubirwaho.
settings.goalErrorRange: Nyamuneka andika amanota hagati ya 1.000 na 10,000.

questionnaire.resetMessage: Ibi bizakuraho igisubizo cyose kandi bitangire guhera. Ibi ntibishobora gusubirwaho.

submitHint.zero: 0 ya @@ PH_0 @@ ibibazo byashubijwe - ibibazo bitashubijwe bitarenze byibuze
submitHint.partial: @@ PH_0 @@ ikibazo gisigaye - ibibazo bitashubijwe bitarenze byibuze | @@ PH_1 @@ ibibazo bisigaye - ibibazo bitashubijwe bitarenze byibuze

submitTitle.zero: Subiza ibibazo bimwe kugirango urangize isuzuma ryawe
submitTitle.partial: @@ PH_0 @@ ikibazo gisigaye | @@ PH_1 @@ ibibazo bisigaye

onboarding.step0Title: Murakaza neza kuri Algorithm ya Manifeste
onboarding.step0Body1: Iki gikoresho kigufasha gupima uburyo uhuza imitekerereze yawe, ingeso zawe, nibikorwa bya buri munsi bihuye no kugera kuntego zawe. Subiza buri kibazo mubyukuri kugirango ubone amanota yawe.
onboarding.step0Body2: Uzuza ibibazo buri gihe kugirango ukurikirane imikurire yawe mugihe kandi urebe uturere dukeneye kwitabwaho cyane.
onboarding.step1Body: Buri kibazo gifite agaciro kateganijwe. Isuzume ku gipimo cya 1-10 kuri buri kibazo. Urutonde rwa 10 bivuze ko ushizemo neza iryo hame; 1 bivuze ko utatangiye.
onboarding.step2Body1: Ibisubizo byawe byose hamwe namateka yabitswe mubikoresho byawe ukoresheje ububiko bwibanga bwa SQLite. Ntakintu cyoherejwe kuri seriveri iyo ariyo yose utabiherewe uburenganzira.
onboarding.step2Body2: Ihitamo ryurungano rwurungano rwawe rugufasha kubona amanota rusange atamenyekanye kubandi bakoresha. Iragabana gusa incamake yashyizweho umukono - ntabwo bigusubiza.

sharing.title: Kugabana Umuyoboro utazwi
sharing.description: Ubishaka utange ibisubizo byawe bitazwi kurubuga rwisi. Nta zina, imeri, aderesi ya IP, cyangwa ID igikoresho cyigeze gisangirwa.
sharing.activeBadge: Score Amanota yawe atamenyekanye arimo gusangirwa nabagenzi bawe
sharing.enableNote: Emera kubona urwego rwawe rwijana ugereranije numuyoboro wisi.

resume.historicalBody: Ibisubizo byawe uhereye kumasomo yawe aheruka yarangije kubanza. Urashaka kugumana izo ndangagaciro nkintangiriro, cyangwa gutangirana nibibazo byuzuye?
resume.activeBody: Ufite isomo ririmo gukorwa. Urashaka gusubukura aho wavuye, cyangwa gutangira isuzuma rishya?
resume.clearWarning: ⚠️ Ibi bizakuraho ibisubizo byose biriho. Urabyizeye?

update.releaseNotesFallback: Sura urupapuro rwo gusohora kugirango ukuremo verisiyo iheruka.
